title: picea glauca
intro: Picea glauca, also known as the white spruce, is a deciduous coniferous tree native to northern North America. The medicinal properties of Picea glauca include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Picea glauca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various health issues.
